name: lobotomized
description: A slimy frog that oozes toxic bubbles. Its skin secretes a mild hallucinogen.

moves.name: lobotomize
moves.desc: lobotomize your opponent, giving them brain damage. gives confusion.

moves.name: w-whats happening
moves.desc: brain damage, forgets injury, so therefore the injury is gone.

moves.name: revelation
moves.desc: realises he has a brain, increases damage.

moves.name: spine rip
moves.desc: ruins the enemies spine, causing paralysis.

moves.name: anesthesia
moves.desc: injects opponent with anesthetic, causing them to sleep.
